title: Capital Requirements Regulation III (CRR3) / CRD6
summary: EU implementation of Basel III final reforms, establishing comprehensive capital requirements for credit institutions and investment firms. Includes standardized and internal model approaches for credit, market, and operational risk.

key_requirements.title: Own funds requirements
key_requirements.description: Institutions must maintain minimum capital ratios: CET1 4.5%, Tier 1 6%, Total Capital 8%

key_requirements.title: Calculation of risk-weighted exposure amounts
key_requirements.description: Standardized approach for credit risk with detailed risk weights by exposure class

key_requirements.title: Market risk capital requirements
key_requirements.description: Fundamental Review of Trading Book (FRTB) requirements for market risk

key_requirements.title: Reporting requirements
key_requirements.description: Regular reporting to competent authorities on capital, liquidity, and risk metrics

engineering_implications.description: Implement standardized approach for credit risk RWA calculation with jurisdiction-specific overlays
Support exposure classification, collateral valuation, and netting set identification
Generate COREP templates for regulatory reporting
Maintain complete audit trail of all RWA calculations and parameter changes

source_references.citation: Regulation (EU) No 575/2013 as amended by CRR3
